name: sensor-app
description: Root tooling for sensor-app (REST API Newman tests)

scripts.test:api: npm run test:api:wait && newman run rest-api_tests.json -e rest-api_environment.json
scripts.test:api:full: npm run test:api:jar && npm run test:api:stack:up && npm run test:api && npm run test:api:stack:down
scripts.test:api:generate: npm run postman:generate && npm run test:api
scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:api:wait && npm --prefix front-end run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e:full: npm run test:api:jar && npm run test:api:stack:up && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:api:stack:down
